SMALLERMAP-DISABLE_MOD.title: Disable Mod
SMALLERMAP-DISABLE_IN_MULTIPLAYER.title: Disable In Multiplayer
Drawings wont line up if players have different map scales.
SMALLERMAP-LOCK_SCROLL_POSITION.title: Lock Scroll Position
SMALLERMAP-LOCK_SCROLL_POSITION.hover.de:
Prevents the map from automatically scrolling as you climb.

If disabled, the map will only scroll up to keep the current room no higher than the center of the screen.
SMALLERMAP-MAP_SCALE.title: Map Scale
SMALLERMAP-ROOM_ICON_SCALE.title: Room Icon Scale
SMALLERMAP-CHAR_ICON_SCALE.title: Char Icon Scale
SMALLERMAP-ROOM_OFFSET_Y.title: Room Offset Y
SMALLERMAP-ROOM_OFFSET_Y.hover.desc:
Negative values shift all normal rooms upwards.
Default: -75
SMALLERMAP-BOSS_OFFSET_Y.title: Boss Offset Y
SMALLERMAP-BOSS_OFFSET_Y.hover.desc:
Negative values shift the boss upwards.
Default: 100
